notes: TTS Voice & Pacing panel is now hidden from view in both the minimized and maximized transcript states (#ttsSettings { display: none }). The underlying speech-synthesis engine and all the controls (voice picker, rate, pitch, sentence-pause sliders) remain in the DOM and continue to function — text-only tracks still play via TTS using stored or default values. The panel can be re-exposed later by removing the single CSS rule.
